summary: M494 — Approved the m356 image-review batch (45 recruitable-NPC frames + earlier). Prologue reordered: start → Lone Goblin → Goblin Pair → Silas Veilward dialog → Veilspawn Herald boss (the misnamed Lost Merchant node is now correctly Silas Veilward and lands right before the boss where his warning + build-gift matter). Mobile party portrait strip now shows a blue mana bar beneath the HP bar for mana-using classes (martial classes unaffected — no empty rail).
